compiled_state.title: RED: Write behavioral tests for gh-availability-check.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## TDD: This IS the RED test task

Create tests/scripts/test-gh-availability-check.sh

## Tests
1. test_gh_authenticated: Mock gh in PATH, mock gh auth status exit 0, assert output GH_STATUS=authenticated
2. test_gh_not_authenticated: Mock gh in PATH, mock gh auth status exit 1, assert GH_STATUS=not_authenticated and FALLBACK=commands (exact gh variable set/gh secret set commands printed)
3. test_gh_not_installed: Empty PATH (no gh), assert GH_STATUS=not_installed and FALLBACK=ui_steps
4. test_fallback_commands_format: When not_authenticated, verify output contains valid gh variable set commands for all bridge variables
5. test_fallback_ui_steps_format: When not_installed, verify output contains GitHub.com navigation instructions
6. test_accepts_variable_list: Call with --vars=JIRA_URL,JIRA_USER --secrets=JIRA_API_TOKEN, verify fallback commands reference these specific vars/secrets

## .test-index
Add: plugins/dso/scripts/gh-availability-check.sh: tests/scripts/test-gh-availability-check.sh [test_gh_authenticated]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists with at least 6 test functions
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-gh-availability-check.sh && grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-gh-availability-check.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'gh-availability-check.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Self-check ACs passed ✓ — all 6 test functions present, .test-index entry with RED marker verified, syntax clean
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files created/modified per agent report. Tests: pass.
